text.title: AI Feature Observability — Four Pillars Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-feature-observability-four-pillars methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-quality-pillar
step.action: Quality metric: per-stratum eval pass rate on sampled traffic + judge model score.

step.name: define-latency-pillar
step.action: Metrics: TTFT, total latency, retry rate. Alerts on p95 breach.

step.name: define-cost-pillar
step.action: Metrics: tokens-in/out, cost-per-call, cost-per-outcome. Alerts on burn-rate.

step.name: define-drift-pillar
step.action: Drift metrics: input distribution shift, output distribution shift, judge-score drift.
step.decision-gate: If drift pillar relies on a judge model, pin judge version + monitor judge drift separately.
